Protein names: Ribosomal RNA large subunit methyltransferase Cfr (EC 2.1.1.224) (23S rRNA (adenine(2503)-C(8))-methyltransferase) (23S rRNA m8A2503 methyltransferase)
Protein families: Radical SAM superfamily, RlmN family, Cfr subfamily
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the radical SAM superfamily. RlmN family. Cfr subfamily. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01873}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=adenosine(2503) in 23S rRNA + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 8-methyladenosine(2503) in 23S rRNA + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42632, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10000, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10001, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10152, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10153, ChEBI:CHEBI:17319, ChEBI:CHEBI:33737, ChEBI:CHEBI:33738, ChEBI:CHEBI:57844, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74411, ChEBI:CHEBI:74543; EC=2.1.1.224; Evidence={ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01873, ECO:0000269|PubMed:21415317};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates position 8 of adenine 2503 in 23S rRNA. Confers resistance to some classes of antibiotics, such as chloramphenicol, florfenicol, clindamycin and linezolid. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01873, ECO:0000269|PubMed:16091044, ECO:0000269|PubMed:18391032, ECO:0000269|PubMed:21415317}.

Protein names: Ribosomal RNA large subunit methyltransferase Cfr (EC 2.1.1.224) (23S rRNA (adenine(2503)-C(8))-methyltransferase) (23S rRNA m8A2503 methyltransferase)
Protein families: Radical SAM superfamily, RlmN family, Cfr subfamily
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the radical SAM superfamily. RlmN family. Cfr subfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=adenosine(2503) in 23S rRNA + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 8-methyladenosine(2503) in 23S rRNA + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42632, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10000, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10001, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10152, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10153, ChEBI:CHEBI:17319, ChEBI:CHEBI:33737, ChEBI:CHEBI:33738, ChEBI:CHEBI:57844, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74411, ChEBI:CHEBI:74543; EC=2.1.1.224; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:19144912};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates position 8 of adenine 2503 in 23S rRNA. Can also methylate position 2 of A2503 after the primary methylation at position 8 is complete, to form 2,8-dimethyladenosine; however, C8 is its preferred target. Confers resistance to several classes of antibiotics such as phenicols, lincosamides, oxazolidinones, pleuromutilins, and streptogramin A. The antibiotic resistance conferred by Cfr is provided by methylation at the 8 position and is independent of methylation at the 2 position of A2503. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:10952608, ECO:0000269|PubMed:19144912}.
